DynamicPermission.SQL:
DECLARE @PermissionIDs dbo.ListNVarchar100Type; INSERT INTO @PermissionIDs VALUES ('ITSMAuthor');
SELECT 'ITSMReleaseSharedReporter' AS PermissionIdent FROM usr.ITSM_FolderTreeView as itsmFolTre WHERE itsmFolTre.FolderTreeIdent = @ITSMCompanyIdent AND itsmFolTre.IsShareAmongAuthors = @StateOne AND EXISTS( SELECT NULL FROM usr.ITSM_GetAllowedFolderTreeByAccountAndPermission(@UserID, @FolderGroupSegmentIdent, @PermissionIDs) WHERE FolderTreeIdent = itsmFolTre.FolderTreeIdent )

DataSource.SQL:
DECLARE @NewITSMRelease_Title_ITSM NVARCHAR(255) = usr.GetResourceText('NewITSMRelease_Title_ITSM', @UserLanguageID)
SELECT ISNULL(CAST(( SELECT CONCAT([ITSMKey] , ' ' , LEFT(itsReq.ReleaseName, 20)) FROM usr.ITSMRelease AS itsReq WHERE itsReq.ID = @ID ) AS NVARCHAR(MAX)), @NewITSMRelease_Title_ITSM) AS Title

DataBind.SQL: SELECT ID, FullName FROM dbo.Account WHERE FullName LIKE @ReleaseManagerAccountID AND [State] = @ActiveState ORDER BY FullName ASC

SelectedDataBind.SQL: SELECT ID, FullName FROM dbo.Account WHERE ID = @ReleaseManagerAccountID

DataBind.SQL: SELECT ID, CONCAT(ITSMKey,' - ',[Subject]) AS [Subject] FROM usr.ITSMChange WHERE ( ITSMKey LIKE @ITSMChangeID OR [Subject] LIKE @ITSMChangeID ) AND [State] != @DeletedState ORDER BY CONCAT(ITSMKey,' - ',[Subject]) ASC

SelectedDataBind.SQL: SELECT ID, CONCAT(ITSMKey,' - ',[Subject]) AS [Subject] FROM usr.ITSMChange WHERE ID = @ITSMChangeID

DataBind.SQL: SELECT dialsetting.Guid, dial.TextValue FROM usr.ITSMReleaseClassificationCategory AS dial INNER JOIN usr.ITSMReleaseClassificationCategorySetting AS dialsetting ON dialsetting.Guid = dial.Guid WHERE dial.LanguageID = @UserLanguageID AND dial.[State] != @DeletedState ORDER BY dial.OrderValue ASC

TimeLineDataBind.SQL: SET @Result = ( SELECT dial.TextValue FROM usr.ITSMReleaseClassificationCategory AS dial INNER JOIN usr.ITSMReleaseClassificationCategorySetting AS dialsetting ON dialsetting.Guid = dial.Guid WHERE dial.LanguageID = @UserLanguageID AND dial.[State] != 0 AND CAST(dialsetting.Guid AS VARCHAR(MAX)) = @Value )

DataBind.SQL: SELECT dialsetting.Guid, dial.TextValue FROM usr.ITSMReleaseDeploymentType AS dial INNER JOIN usr.ITSMReleaseDeploymentTypeSetting AS dialsetting ON dialsetting.Guid = dial.Guid WHERE dial.LanguageID = @UserLanguageID AND dial.[State] != @DeletedState ORDER BY dial.OrderValue ASC

TimeLineDataBind.SQL: SET @Result = ( SELECT dial.TextValue FROM usr.ITSMReleaseDeploymentType AS dial INNER JOIN usr.ITSMReleaseDeploymentTypeSetting AS dialsetting ON dialsetting.Guid = dial.Guid WHERE dial.LanguageID = @UserLanguageID AND dial.[State] != 0 AND CAST(dialsetting.Guid AS VARCHAR(MAX)) = @Value )

DataBind.SQL: SELECT dialsetting.Guid, dial.TextValue FROM usr.ITSMOperationalEnvironmentType AS dial INNER JOIN usr.ITSMOperationalEnvironmentTypeSetting AS dialsetting ON dialsetting.Guid = dial.Guid WHERE dial.LanguageID = @UserLanguageID AND dial.[State] != @DeletedState ORDER BY dial.OrderValue ASC

TimeLineDataBind.SQL: SET @Result = ( SELECT dial.TextValue FROM usr.ITSMOperationalEnvironmentType AS dial INNER JOIN usr.ITSMOperationalEnvironmentTypeSetting AS dialsetting ON dialsetting.Guid = dial.Guid WHERE dial.LanguageID = @UserLanguageID AND dial.[State] != 0 AND CAST(dialsetting.Guid AS VARCHAR(MAX)) = @Value )

DataBind.SQL: SELECT dialsetting.Guid, dial.TextValue FROM usr.ITSMReleaseApprovalDecisionResult AS dial INNER JOIN usr.ITSMReleaseApprovalDecisionResultSetting AS dialsetting ON dialsetting.Guid = dial.Guid WHERE dial.LanguageID = @UserLanguageID AND dial.[State] != @DeletedState ORDER BY dial.OrderValue ASC

TimeLineDataBind.SQL: SET @Result = ( SELECT dial.TextValue FROM usr.ITSMReleaseApprovalDecisionResult AS dial INNER JOIN usr.ITSMReleaseApprovalDecisionResultSetting AS dialsetting ON dialsetting.Guid = dial.Guid WHERE dial.LanguageID = @UserLanguageID AND dial.[State] != 0 AND CAST(dialsetting.Guid AS VARCHAR(MAX)) = @Value )

DataBind.SQL: SELECT dialsetting.Guid, dial.TextValue FROM usr.ITSMReleaseTestSummaryConclusion AS dial INNER JOIN usr.ITSMReleaseTestSummaryConclusionSetting AS dialsetting ON dialsetting.Guid = dial.Guid WHERE dial.LanguageID = @UserLanguageID AND dial.[State] != @DeletedState ORDER BY dial.OrderValue ASC

TimeLineDataBind.SQL: SET @Result = ( SELECT dial.TextValue FROM usr.ITSMReleaseTestSummaryConclusion AS dial INNER JOIN usr.ITSMReleaseTestSummaryConclusionSetting AS dialsetting ON dialsetting.Guid = dial.Guid WHERE dial.LanguageID = @UserLanguageID AND dial.[State] != 0 AND CAST(dialsetting.Guid AS VARCHAR(MAX)) = @Value )

DataBind.SQL: SELECT dialsetting.Guid, dial.TextValue FROM usr.ITSMReleaseTestExecutionResult AS dial INNER JOIN usr.ITSMReleaseTestExecutionResultSetting AS dialsetting ON dialsetting.Guid = dial.Guid WHERE dial.LanguageID = @UserLanguageID AND dial.[State] != @DeletedState ORDER BY dial.OrderValue ASC

TimeLineDataBind.SQL: SET @Result = ( SELECT dial.TextValue FROM usr.ITSMReleaseTestExecutionResult AS dial INNER JOIN usr.ITSMReleaseTestExecutionResultSetting AS dialsetting ON dialsetting.Guid = dial.Guid WHERE dial.LanguageID = @UserLanguageID AND dial.[State] != 0 AND CAST(dialsetting.Guid AS VARCHAR(MAX)) = @Value )
SET @Result = ( SELECT usr.GetResourceText( CASE @Value WHEN 1 THEN 'Yes_ITSM' WHEN 0 THEN 'No_ITSM' END ,@UserLanguageID) )

DataSource.SQL: SELECT itsApp.ID ,itsApp.ApproveOrder ,itsApp.ApproverType AS ApproverTypeValue ,approverGro.[Name] AS ApproverGroupID ,approverAcc.FullName AS ApproverAccountID FROM usr.ITSMApproval AS itsApp LEFT JOIN dbo.[Group] AS approverGro on approverGro.ID = itsApp.ApproverGroupID LEFT JOIN dbo.[Account] AS approverAcc on approverAcc.ID = itsApp.ApproverAccountID WHERE itsApp.TableID = @ID AND itsApp.FormIdent = @ThisFormIdent AND itsApp.[State] != @DeletedState AND itsApp.ApproveRoundGUID = @ActualApproveRoundGuid

DataBind.SQL: SELECT MAX(ApproveOrder) AS ApproveOrder FROM @ITSMApprovalRequestFakeSubForm

DataSource.SQL: SELECT CASE itsApp.ApproverType WHEN 'Account' THEN approverAcc.FullName WHEN 'Group' THEN approverGro.[Name] END AS ApproverName, ITSMKey, approvedAcc.FullName AS ApprovedName, CASE WHEN itsApp.IsApproved = 0 THEN 'NotApproved_ITSM' WHEN itsApp.IsApproved = 1 THEN 'Approved_ITSM' WHEN EXISTS( SELECT NULL FROM usr.ITSMApprovalEscalation AS itsmAppEsc WHERE itsmAppEsc.ITSMApprovalID = itsApp.ID ) THEN 'ApprovalEscalated_ITSM' ELSE 'WithoutReaction_ITSM' END AS IsApproved, CASE WHEN itsApp.IsApproved = 0 THEN 'bg-danger-lmtl4 bg-opacity-25-lmtl4 text-dark-lmtl4' WHEN itsApp.IsApproved = 1 THEN 'bg-success-lmtl4 bg-opacity-25-lmtl4 text-dark-lmtl4' WHEN EXISTS( SELECT NULL FROM usr.ITSMApprovalEscalation AS itsmAppEsc WHERE itsmAppEsc.ITSMApprovalID = itsApp.ID ) THEN 'bg-warning-lmtl4 bg-opacity-25-lmtl4 text-dark-lmtl4' ELSE '' END AS TrCssClass, itsApp.ApproveDateTime, itsApp.ApproveComment FROM usr.ITSMApproval AS itsApp LEFT JOIN dbo.[Group] AS approverGro on approverGro.ID = itsApp.ApproverGroupID LEFT JOIN dbo.[Account] AS approverAcc on approverAcc.ID = itsApp.ApproverAccountID LEFT JOIN dbo.[Account] AS approvedAcc ON approvedAcc.ID = itsApp.ApprovedAccountID WHERE itsApp.TableID = @ID AND itsApp.FormIdent = @ThisFormIdent AND itsApp.[State] != @DeletedState AND ApproveRoundStartDateTime IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ApproveRoundStartDateTime ASC, ApproveOrder ASC

SELECT ITSMKey FROM ( SELECT CASE itsApp.ApproverType WHEN 'Account' THEN approverAcc.FullName WHEN 'Group' THEN approverGro.[Name] END AS ApproverName, ITSMKey, approvedAcc.FullName AS ApprovedName, CASE itsApp.IsApproved WHEN 0 THEN 'NotApproved_ITSM' WHEN 1 THEN 'Approved_ITSM' ELSE 'WithoutReaction_ITSM' END AS IsApproved, itsApp.ApproveDateTime, itsApp.ApproveComment, itsApp.ApproveRoundStartDateTime, itsApp.ApproveOrder, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY ITSMKey ORDER BY ApproveRoundStartDateTime ASC, ApproveOrder ASC) AS rn FROM usr.ITSMApproval AS itsApp LEFT JOIN dbo.[Group] AS approverGro ON approverGro.ID = itsApp.ApproverGroupID LEFT JOIN dbo.[Account] AS approverAcc ON approverAcc.ID = itsApp.ApproverAccountID LEFT JOIN dbo.[Account] AS approvedAcc ON approvedAcc.ID = itsApp.ApprovedAccountID WHERE itsApp.TableID = @ID AND itsApp.FormIdent = @ThisFormIdent AND itsApp.[State] != @DeletedState AND ApproveRoundStartDateTime IS NOT NULL ) AS sub WHERE rn = 1 ORDER BY ApproveRoundStartDateTime DESC, ApproveOrder ASC

SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY itsApp.ApproveOrder ASC) AS RowNum ,CONCAT(itsApp.ApproverType, '_ITSM') AS ApproverTypeValue ,itsApp.ApproverType ,approverGro.[Name] AS ApproverGroupID ,approverAcc.FullName AS ApproverAccountID FROM @ITSMApprovalRequestFakeSubForm AS itsApp LEFT JOIN dbo.[Group] AS approverGro on approverGro.ID = itsApp.ApproverGroupID LEFT JOIN dbo.[Account] AS approverAcc on approverAcc.ID = itsApp.ApproverAccountID ORDER BY itsApp.ApproveOrder ASC

SelectedDataBind.SQL: SELECT fot.Ident ,fol.[Name] FROM dbo.Folder AS fol INNER JOIN dbo.FolderTree AS fot ON fot.FolderID = fol.ID WHERE fot.Ident = @ITSMCompanyIdent

DataBind.SQL:
DECLARE @PermissionIDs dbo.ListNVarchar100Type; INSERT INTO @PermissionIDs VALUES ('ITSMAuthor'), ('ITSMOperator');
DECLARE @OperatorOnlyPermissionIDs dbo.ListNVarchar100Type; INSERT INTO @OperatorOnlyPermissionIDs VALUES ('ITSMOperator');
IF(@ReporterAccountID IS NULL OR @ReporterAccountID = @UserID)
SELECT itsmFolPer.FolderTreeIdent AS Ident ,itsmFolPer.FolderName AS [Name] FROM usr.ITSM_GetAllowedFolderTreeByAccountAndPermissionAndSegmentType(@UserID,@FolderGroupSegmentIdent,'ITSMReleaseSegment',@PermissionIDs) as itsmFolPer WHERE itsmFolPer.FolderLevel = @Level AND itsmFolPer.ParentFolderTreeIdent = @ITSMCompanyIdent AND itsmFolPer.FolderState = @FolderActiveState
UNION
SELECT fot.Ident, fol.[Name] FROM dbo.FolderTree AS fot INNER JOIN dbo.Folder AS fol ON fol.ID = fot.FolderID INNER JOIN dbo.FolderTree AS fotP ON fotP.ID = fot.ParentFolderTreeID AND fotP.Ident = @ITSMCompanyIdent WHERE fot.Ident = @ITSMCategoryLevel2Ident
ELSE
SELECT itsmFolPer.FolderTreeIdent AS Ident ,itsmFolPer.FolderName AS [Name] FROM usr.ITSM_GetAllowedFolderTreeByAccountAndPermissionAndSegmentType(@UserID,@FolderGroupSegmentIdent,'ITSMReleaseSegment',@OperatorOnlyPermissionIDs) as itsmFolPer INNER JOIN usr.ITSM_GetAllowedFolderTreeByAccountAndPermissionAndSegmentType(@ReporterAccountID,@FolderGroupSegmentIdent,'ITSMReleaseSegment',@PermissionIDs) as itsmFolPerReporter ON itsmFolPerReporter.FolderTreeID = itsmFolPer.FolderTreeID WHERE itsmFolPer.FolderLevel = @Level AND itsmFolPer.ParentFolderTreeIdent = @ITSMCompanyIdent AND itsmFolPer.FolderState = @FolderActiveState
UNION
SELECT fot.Ident, fol.[Name] FROM dbo.FolderTree AS fot INNER JOIN dbo.Folder AS fol ON fol.ID = fot.FolderID INNER JOIN dbo.FolderTree AS fotP ON fotP.ID = fot.ParentFolderTreeID AND fotP.Ident = @ITSMCompanyIdent WHERE fot.Ident = @ITSMCategoryLevel2Ident

DECLARE @PermissionIDs dbo.ListNVarchar100Type; INSERT INTO @PermissionIDs VALUES ('ITSMAuthor'), ('ITSMOperator');
DECLARE @OperatorOnlyPermissionIDs dbo.ListNVarchar100Type; INSERT INTO @OperatorOnlyPermissionIDs VALUES ('ITSMOperator');
IF(@ReporterAccountID IS NULL OR @ReporterAccountID = @UserID)
SELECT itsmFolPer.FolderTreeIdent AS Ident ,itsmFolPer.FolderName AS [Name] FROM usr.ITSM_GetAllowedFolderTreeByAccountAndPermissionAndSegmentType(@UserID,@FolderGroupSegmentIdent,'ITSMReleaseSegment',@PermissionIDs) as itsmFolPer WHERE itsmFolPer.FolderLevel = @Level AND itsmFolPer.ParentFolderTreeIdent = @ITSMCategoryLevel2Ident AND itsmFolPer.FolderState = @FolderActiveState
UNION
SELECT fot.Ident, fol.[Name] FROM dbo.FolderTree AS fot INNER JOIN dbo.Folder AS fol ON fol.ID = fot.FolderID INNER JOIN dbo.FolderTree AS fotP ON fotP.ID = fot.ParentFolderTreeID AND fotP.Ident = @ITSMCategoryLevel2Ident WHERE fot.Ident = @ITSMCategoryLevel3Ident
ELSE
SELECT itsmFolPer.FolderTreeIdent AS Ident ,itsmFolPer.FolderName AS [Name] FROM usr.ITSM_GetAllowedFolderTreeByAccountAndPermissionAndSegmentType(@UserID,@FolderGroupSegmentIdent,'ITSMReleaseSegment',@OperatorOnlyPermissionIDs) as itsmFolPer INNER JOIN usr.ITSM_GetAllowedFolderTreeByAccountAndPermissionAndSegmentType(@ReporterAccountID,@FolderGroupSegmentIdent,'ITSMReleaseSegment',@PermissionIDs) as itsmFolPerReporter ON itsmFolPerReporter.FolderTreeID = itsmFolPer.FolderTreeID WHERE itsmFolPer.FolderLevel = @Level AND itsmFolPer.ParentFolderTreeIdent = @ITSMCategoryLevel2Ident AND itsmFolPer.FolderState = @FolderActiveState
UNION
SELECT fot.Ident, fol.[Name] FROM dbo.FolderTree AS fot INNER JOIN dbo.Folder AS fol ON fol.ID = fot.FolderID INNER JOIN dbo.FolderTree AS fotP ON fotP.ID = fot.ParentFolderTreeID AND fotP.Ident = @ITSMCategoryLevel2Ident WHERE fot.Ident = @ITSMCategoryLevel3Ident

DECLARE @PermissionIDs dbo.ListNVarchar100Type; INSERT INTO @PermissionIDs VALUES ('ITSMAuthor'), ('ITSMOperator');
DECLARE @OperatorOnlyPermissionIDs dbo.ListNVarchar100Type; INSERT INTO @OperatorOnlyPermissionIDs VALUES ('ITSMOperator');
IF(@ReporterAccountID IS NULL OR @ReporterAccountID = @UserID)
SELECT itsmFolPer.FolderTreeIdent AS Ident ,itsmFolPer.FolderName AS [Name] FROM usr.ITSM_GetAllowedFolderTreeByAccountAndPermissionAndSegmentType(@UserID,@FolderGroupSegmentIdent,'ITSMReleaseSegment',@PermissionIDs) as itsmFolPer WHERE itsmFolPer.FolderLevel = @Level AND itsmFolPer.ParentFolderTreeIdent = @ITSMCategoryLevel3Ident AND itsmFolPer.FolderState = @FolderActiveState
UNION
SELECT fot.Ident, fol.[Name] FROM dbo.FolderTree AS fot INNER JOIN dbo.Folder AS fol ON fol.ID = fot.FolderID INNER JOIN dbo.FolderTree AS fotP ON fotP.ID = fot.ParentFolderTreeID AND fotP.Ident = @ITSMCategoryLevel3Ident WHERE fot.Ident = @ITSMCategoryLevel4Ident
ELSE
SELECT itsmFolPer.FolderTreeIdent AS Ident ,itsmFolPer.FolderName AS [Name] FROM usr.ITSM_GetAllowedFolderTreeByAccountAndPermissionAndSegmentType(@UserID,@FolderGroupSegmentIdent,'ITSMReleaseSegment',@OperatorOnlyPermissionIDs) as itsmFolPer INNER JOIN usr.ITSM_GetAllowedFolderTreeByAccountAndPermissionAndSegmentType(@ReporterAccountID,@FolderGroupSegmentIdent,'ITSMReleaseSegment',@PermissionIDs) as itsmFolPerReporter ON itsmFolPerReporter.FolderTreeID = itsmFolPer.FolderTreeID WHERE itsmFolPer.FolderLevel = @Level AND itsmFolPer.ParentFolderTreeIdent = @ITSMCategoryLevel3Ident AND itsmFolPer.FolderState = @FolderActiveState
UNION
SELECT fot.Ident, fol.[Name] FROM dbo.FolderTree AS fot INNER JOIN dbo.Folder AS fol ON fol.ID = fot.FolderID INNER JOIN dbo.FolderTree AS fotP ON fotP.ID = fot.ParentFolderTreeID AND fotP.Ident = @ITSMCategoryLevel3Ident WHERE fot.Ident = @ITSMCategoryLevel4Ident

DECLARE @PermissionIDs dbo.ListNVarchar100Type; INSERT INTO @PermissionIDs VALUES ('ITSMAuthor'), ('ITSMOperator');
DECLARE @OperatorOnlyPermissionIDs dbo.ListNVarchar100Type; INSERT INTO @OperatorOnlyPermissionIDs VALUES ('ITSMOperator');
IF(@ReporterAccountID IS NULL OR @ReporterAccountID = @UserID)
SELECT itsmFolPer.FolderTreeIdent AS Ident ,itsmFolPer.FolderName AS [Name] FROM usr.ITSM_GetAllowedFolderTreeByAccountAndPermissionAndSegmentType(@UserID,@FolderGroupSegmentIdent,'ITSMReleaseSegment',@PermissionIDs) as itsmFolPer WHERE itsmFolPer.FolderLevel = @Level AND itsmFolPer.ParentFolderTreeIdent = @ITSMCategoryLevel4Ident AND itsmFolPer.FolderState = @FolderActiveState
UNION
SELECT fot.Ident, fol.[Name] FROM dbo.FolderTree AS fot INNER JOIN dbo.Folder AS fol ON fol.ID = fot.FolderID INNER JOIN dbo.FolderTree AS fotP ON fotP.ID = fot.ParentFolderTreeID AND fotP.Ident = @ITSMCategoryLevel4Ident WHERE fot.Ident = @ITSMCategoryLevel5Ident
ELSE
SELECT itsmFolPer.FolderTreeIdent AS Ident ,itsmFolPer.FolderName AS [Name] FROM usr.ITSM_GetAllowedFolderTreeByAccountAndPermissionAndSegmentType(@UserID,@FolderGroupSegmentIdent,'ITSMReleaseSegment',@OperatorOnlyPermissionIDs) as itsmFolPer INNER JOIN usr.ITSM_GetAllowedFolderTreeByAccountAndPermissionAndSegmentType(@ReporterAccountID,@FolderGroupSegmentIdent,'ITSMReleaseSegment',@PermissionIDs) as itsmFolPerReporter ON itsmFolPerReporter.FolderTreeID = itsmFolPer.FolderTreeID WHERE itsmFolPer.FolderLevel = @Level AND itsmFolPer.ParentFolderTreeIdent = @ITSMCategoryLevel4Ident AND itsmFolPer.FolderState = @FolderActiveState
UNION
SELECT fot.Ident, fol.[Name] FROM dbo.FolderTree AS fot INNER JOIN dbo.Folder AS fol ON fol.ID = fot.FolderID INNER JOIN dbo.FolderTree AS fotP ON fotP.ID = fot.ParentFolderTreeID AND fotP.Ident = @ITSMCategoryLevel4Ident WHERE fot.Ident = @ITSMCategoryLevel5Ident

DECLARE @PermissionIDs dbo.ListNVarchar100Type; INSERT INTO @PermissionIDs VALUES ('ITSMAuthor'), ('ITSMOperator');
SELECT IIF( EXISTS( SELECT NULL FROM usr.ITSM_GetAllowedFolderTreeByAccountAndPermissionAndSegmentType(@UserID,@FolderGroupSegmentIdent,'ITSMReleaseSegment',@PermissionIDs) WHERE FolderLevel = @Level AND ParentFolderTreeIdent = @ITSMCategoryLevel2Ident ) , 1 , 0 ) AS IsShowCategoryLevel3

DECLARE @PermissionIDs dbo.ListNVarchar100Type; INSERT INTO @PermissionIDs VALUES ('ITSMAuthor'), ('ITSMOperator');
SELECT IIF( EXISTS( SELECT NULL FROM usr.ITSM_GetAllowedFolderTreeByAccountAndPermissionAndSegmentType(@UserID,@FolderGroupSegmentIdent,'ITSMReleaseSegment',@PermissionIDs) WHERE FolderLevel = @Level AND ParentFolderTreeIdent = @ITSMCategoryLevel3Ident ) , 1 , 0 ) AS IsShowCategoryLevel4

DECLARE @PermissionIDs dbo.ListNVarchar100Type; INSERT INTO @PermissionIDs VALUES ('ITSMAuthor'), ('ITSMOperator');
SELECT IIF( EXISTS( SELECT NULL FROM usr.ITSM_GetAllowedFolderTreeByAccountAndPermissionAndSegmentType(@UserID,@FolderGroupSegmentIdent,'ITSMReleaseSegment',@PermissionIDs) WHERE FolderLevel = @Level AND ParentFolderTreeIdent = @ITSMCategoryLevel4Ident ) , 1 , 0 ) AS IsShowCategoryLevel5

DECLARE @PermissionIDs dbo.ListNVarchar100Type; INSERT INTO @PermissionIDs VALUES ('ITSMOperator');
/*DECLARE @LastITSMCategoryIdent VARCHAR(900) = COALESCE(@ITSMCategoryLevel5Ident, @ITSMCategoryLevel4Ident, @ITSMCategoryLevel3Ident, @ITSMCategoryLevel2Ident, @ITSMCompanyIdent)*/ DECLARE @LastITSMCategoryIdent VARCHAR(900) = @ITSMCategoryLevel2Ident; IF @IsShowCategoryLevel3 = 1 SET @LastITSMCategoryIdent = @ITSMCategoryLevel3Ident IF @IsShowCategoryLevel4 = 1 SET @LastITSMCategoryIdent = @ITSMCategoryLevel4Ident IF @IsShowCategoryLevel5 = 1 SET @LastITSMCategoryIdent = @ITSMCategoryLevel5Ident
IF @IsElevatedPermissionOrNotFirstState IS NULL SET @LastITSMCategoryIdent = COALESCE(@ITSMCategoryLevel5Ident, @ITSMCategoryLevel4Ident, @ITSMCategoryLevel3Ident, @ITSMCategoryLevel2Ident, @ITSMCompanyIdent)
IF @LastITSMCategoryIdent IS NULL
SELECT @IsElevatedPermissionOrNotFirstState AS IsElevatedPermissionOrNotFirstState
ELSE
SELECT IIF( EXISTS( SELECT NULL FROM usr.ITSM_GetAllowedFolderTreeByAccountAndPermissionAndSegmentType(@UserID,@FolderGroupSegmentIdent,'ITSMReleaseSegment',@PermissionIDs) WHERE FolderTreeIdent = @LastITSMCategoryIdent ) OR ISNULL(@ID, 0) != 0 , 1, 0) AS IsElevatedPermissionOrNotFirstState

EmptyDataBind.SQL:
DECLARE @PermissionIDs dbo.ListNVarchar100Type; INSERT INTO @PermissionIDs VALUES ('ITSMOperator');
DECLARE @LastFolderTreeIdent VARCHAR(900) = COALESCE(@ITSMCategoryLevel5Ident, @ITSMCategoryLevel4Ident, @ITSMCategoryLevel3Ident, @ITSMCategoryLevel2Ident, @ITSMCompanyIdent)
IF EXISTS( SELECT NULL FROM usr.ITSM_GetAllowedFolderTreeByAccountAndPermissionAndSegmentType(@UserID,@FolderGroupSegmentIdent,'ITSMReleaseSegment',@PermissionIDs) WHERE FolderTreeIdent = @LastFolderTreeIdent ) BEGIN
INSERT INTO @PermissionIDs VALUES ('ITSMAuthor')
SELECT TOP(20) itsGaabftap.AccountID AS ID, itsGaabftap.AccountFullName AS FullName FROM usr.ITSM_GetAllowedAccountByFolderTreeAndPermission (@LastFolderTreeIdent, @PermissionIDs) AS itsGaabftap
END ELSE BEGIN
SELECT acc.ID, acc.FullName FROM dbo.Account AS acc WHERE acc.ID = @UserID
END

DataBind.SQL:
DECLARE @PermissionIDs dbo.ListNVarchar100Type; INSERT INTO @PermissionIDs VALUES ('ITSMOperator');
DECLARE @LastFolderTreeIdent VARCHAR(900) = COALESCE(@ITSMCategoryLevel5Ident, @ITSMCategoryLevel4Ident, @ITSMCategoryLevel3Ident, @ITSMCategoryLevel2Ident, @ITSMCompanyIdent)
IF EXISTS( SELECT NULL FROM usr.ITSM_GetAllowedFolderTreeByAccountAndPermissionAndSegmentType(@UserID,@FolderGroupSegmentIdent,'ITSMReleaseSegment',@PermissionIDs) WHERE FolderTreeIdent = @LastFolderTreeIdent ) BEGIN
INSERT INTO @PermissionIDs VALUES ('ITSMAuthor')
SELECT itsGaabftap.AccountID AS ID, itsGaabftap.AccountFullName AS FullName FROM usr.ITSM_GetAllowedAccountByFolderTreeAndPermission (@LastFolderTreeIdent, @PermissionIDs) AS itsGaabftap WHERE itsGaabftap.AccountFullName LIKE @ReporterAccountID
END ELSE BEGIN
SELECT acc.ID, acc.FullName FROM dbo.Account AS acc WHERE acc.ID = @UserID
END

SelectedDataBind.SQL: SELECT acc.ID, acc.FullName FROM dbo.Account AS acc WHERE acc.ID = @ReporterAccountID

DefaultDependencyDataBind.SQL:
DECLARE @PermissionIDs dbo.ListNVarchar100Type; INSERT INTO @PermissionIDs VALUES ('ITSMOperator');
DECLARE @NewReporterAccountID INT
DECLARE @LastFolderTreeIdent VARCHAR(900) = COALESCE(@ITSMCategoryLevel5Ident, @ITSMCategoryLevel4Ident, @ITSMCategoryLevel3Ident, @ITSMCategoryLevel2Ident, @ITSMCompanyIdent)
IF EXISTS( SELECT NULL FROM usr.ITSM_GetAllowedFolderTreeByAccountAndPermissionAndSegmentType(@UserID,@FolderGroupSegmentIdent,'ITSMReleaseSegment',@PermissionIDs) WHERE FolderTreeIdent = @LastFolderTreeIdent ) BEGIN
INSERT INTO @PermissionIDs VALUES ('ITSMAuthor')
SELECT @NewReporterAccountID = itsGaabftap.AccountID FROM usr.ITSM_GetAllowedAccountByFolderTreeAndPermission (@LastFolderTreeIdent, @PermissionIDs) AS itsGaabftap WHERE itsGaabftap.AccountID = @ReporterAccountID
END
IF @NewReporterAccountID IS NULL SELECT @NewReporterAccountID = @UserID
SELECT acc.ID, acc.FullName FROM dbo.Account AS acc WHERE acc.ID = @NewReporterAccountID

DataBind.SQL:
SELECT Email AS ReporterEmail FROM dbo.Account WHERE ID = @ReporterAccountID
INSERT INTO ##TmpTbl ([Message]) SELECT CONCAT('ReporterEmail - ReporterAccountID: ', @ReporterAccountID)

DefaultDataSource.SQL: SELECT Email AS ReporterEmail FROM dbo.Account WHERE ID = @UserID

DataBind.SQL: SELECT IIF( ISNULL(( SELECT Email FROM dbo.Account WHERE ID = @ReporterAccountID ), '') != ISNULL(@ReporterEmail, '') ,1,0) AS IsReporterEmailDifferent
SELECT Phone AS ReporterPhone FROM dbo.Account WHERE ID = @ReporterAccountID

DefaultDataSource.SQL: SELECT Phone AS ReporterPhone FROM dbo.Account WHERE ID = @UserID

DataBind.SQL: SELECT IIF( ISNULL(( SELECT Phone FROM dbo.Account WHERE ID = @ReporterAccountID ), '') != ISNULL(@ReporterPhone, '') ,1,0) AS IsReporterPhoneDifferent

SELECT dialsetting.Guid, dial.TextValue FROM usr.ITSMEntryMethodType AS dial INNER JOIN usr.ITSMEntryMethodTypeSetting AS dialsetting ON dialsetting.Guid = dial.Guid WHERE dial.LanguageID = @UserLanguageID AND dial.[State] != @DeletedState ORDER BY dial.OrderValue ASC

DefaultDataSource.SQL: SELECT [GUID] AS ITSMEntryMethodTypeGuid FROM usr.ITSMEntryMethodTypeSetting WHERE FunctionalKey = 'user' AND [State] != @DeletedState

TimeLineDataBind.SQL: SET @Result = ( SELECT dial.TextValue FROM usr.ITSMEntryMethodType AS dial INNER JOIN usr.ITSMEntryMethodTypeSetting AS dialsetting ON dialsetting.Guid = dial.Guid WHERE dial.LanguageID = @UserLanguageID AND dial.[State] != 0 AND CAST(dialsetting.Guid AS VARCHAR(MAX)) = @Value )

OtherSource.SQL: SELECT c.ID FROM dbo.Communication as c WHERE c.TableID = @ID AND c.FormIdent = @FormIdent AND c.ControlIdent = @ControlIdent

DataSource.SQL:
SELECT ISNULL(itsReq.[State], 1) AS [State]
,itsReq.ID ,itsReq.ITSMKey
,itsReqParent.ID AS ParentTableID ,itsReqParent.ITSMKey AS ParentITSMKey
,accCreator.FullName AS AccountID ,itsReq.CreateDate
,accLastUpdate.FullName AS LastUpdateAccountID ,itsReq.LastUpdate
FROM (VALUES (0)) AS dual(zero) LEFT JOIN usr.ITSMRelease AS itsReq ON itsReq.ID = @ID LEFT JOIN usr.ITSMRelease AS itsReqParent ON itsReqParent.ID = itsReq.ParentTableID LEFT JOIN dbo.Account AS accCreator ON accCreator.ID = ISNULL(itsReq.AccountID, @UserID) LEFT JOIN dbo.Account AS accLastUpdate ON accLastUpdate.ID = itsReq.LastUpdateAccountID

DECLARE @ApprovedColor varchar(7) = '#4CAF50'; DECLARE @NotApprovedColor varchar(7) = '#ff7043';
SELECT CASE ISNULL(itsApp.IsApproved,0) WHEN 0 THEN @NotApprovedColor WHEN 1 THEN @ApprovedColor END AS BackgroundColor ,'#FFF' AS Color ,CASE WHEN itsApp.ApproverType = 'Group' THEN ISNULL(approverGro.[Name], '') WHEN itsApp.ApproverType = 'Account' THEN ISNULL(approverAcc.FullName, '') ELSE '' END AS Title FROM usr.ITSMApproval AS itsApp LEFT JOIN dbo.[Group] AS approverGro on approverGro.ID = itsApp.ApproverGroupID LEFT JOIN dbo.[Account] AS approverAcc on approverAcc.ID = itsApp.ApproverAccountID WHERE itsApp.TableID = @ID AND itsApp.FormIdent = @FormIdent AND itsApp.[State] != @DeletedState AND itsApp.ApproveRoundGUID = @ActualApproveRoundGuid AND itsApp.ApproveRoundStartDateTime IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ApproveOrder ASC

SELECT SUM(IIF(ISNULL(itsApp.IsApproved,0) = 0, 0, 1)) AS Approved ,COUNT(*) AS Total FROM usr.ITSMApproval AS itsApp LEFT JOIN dbo.[Group] AS approverGro on approverGro.ID = itsApp.ApproverGroupID LEFT JOIN dbo.[Account] AS approverAcc on approverAcc.ID = itsApp.ApproverAccountID WHERE itsApp.TableID = @ID AND itsApp.FormIdent = @FormIdent AND itsApp.[State] != @DeletedState AND itsApp.ApproveRoundGUID = @ActualApproveRoundGuid AND itsApp.ApproveRoundStartDateTime IS NOT NULL HAVING COUNT(*) > 0

DECLARE @ApprovedColor varchar(7) = '#4CAF50'; DECLARE @NotApprovedColor varchar(7) = '#ff7043';
SELECT CASE ISNULL(itsApp.IsApproved,0) WHEN 0 THEN @NotApprovedColor WHEN 1 THEN @ApprovedColor END AS BackgroundColor ,'#FFF' AS Color ,CASE WHEN itsApp.AssessmentType = 'Group' THEN ISNULL(AssessmentGro.[Name], '') WHEN itsApp.AssessmentType = 'Account' THEN ISNULL(AssessmentAcc.FullName, '') ELSE '' END AS Title FROM usr.ITSMAssessment AS itsApp LEFT JOIN dbo.[Group] AS AssessmentGro on AssessmentGro.ID = itsApp.AssessmentGroupID LEFT JOIN dbo.[Account] AS AssessmentAcc on AssessmentAcc.ID = itsApp.AssessmentAccountID WHERE itsApp.TableID = @ID AND itsApp.FormIdent = @FormIdent AND itsApp.[State] != @DeletedState AND itsApp.AssessmentRoundGUID = @ActualAssessmentRoundGuid AND itsApp.AssessmentRoundStartDateTime IS NOT NULL ORDER BY AssessmentOrder ASC

SELECT SUM(IIF(ISNULL(itsApp.IsApproved,0) = 0, 0, 1)) AS Approved ,COUNT(*) AS Total FROM usr.ITSMAssessment AS itsApp LEFT JOIN dbo.[Group] AS AssessmentGro on AssessmentGro.ID = itsApp.AssessmentGroupID LEFT JOIN dbo.[Account] AS AssessmentAcc on AssessmentAcc.ID = itsApp.AssessmentAccountID WHERE itsApp.TableID = @ID AND itsApp.FormIdent = @FormIdent AND itsApp.[State] != @DeletedState AND itsApp.AssessmentRoundGUID = @ActualAssessmentRoundGuid AND itsApp.AssessmentRoundStartDateTime IS NOT NULL HAVING COUNT(*) > 0

DataBind.SQL:
DECLARE @PermissionIDs dbo.ListNVarchar100Type; INSERT INTO @PermissionIDs VALUES ('ITSMSpecialist'), ('ITSMOperator'), ('ITSMAuthor');
SELECT itsm.SourceID AS ID ,CONCAT(itsm.ITSMKey,' - ',itsm.[Subject]) AS [ITSMTitle] FROM usr.ITSM_FormFullView AS itsm WHERE ( itsm.ITSMKey LIKE @ParentTableID OR itsm.[Subject] LIKE @ParentTableID ) AND itsm.SourceID != ISNULL(@ID, -1) AND itsm.SourceFormIdent = @SourceFormIdent AND itsm.LastFolderTreeIdent IN ( SELECT FolderTreeIdent FROM usr.ITSM_GetAllowedFolderTreeByAccountAndPermission(@UserID, @FolderGroupSegmentIdent, @PermissionIDs) )

SelectedDataBind.SQL: SELECT itsm.SourceID AS ID ,CONCAT(itsm.ITSMKey,' - ',itsm.[Subject]) AS [ITSMTitle] FROM usr.ITSM_FormFullView AS itsm WHERE itsm.SourceID = @ParentTableID AND itsm.SourceFormIdent = @SourceFormIdent

DataSource.SQL: DECLARE @ThisID_ITSM VARCHAR(255) = usr.GetResourceText('ThisID_ITSM', @UserLanguageID); SELECT itsmLinSbf.ID ,itsmLit.TextValue AS ITSMLinkTypeGuid ,IIF(itsmS.UniqueSourceIdent = CONCAT(@ID, '#', @ThisFormIdent), usr.GetResourceText('ThisRecord_ITSM', @UserLanguageID), CONCAT('', itsmS.[ITSMKey], '') ) AS SourceUniqueIdent ,IIF(itsmT.UniqueSourceIdent = CONCAT(@ID, '#', @ThisFormIdent), usr.GetResourceText('ThisRecord_ITSM', @UserLanguageID), CONCAT('', itsmT.[ITSMKey], '') ) AS TargetUniqueIdent FROM usr.ITSMLinkSubForm AS itsmLinSbf INNER JOIN usr.ITSM_FormFullView AS itsmS ON itsmS.UniqueSourceIdent = itsmLinSbf.SourceUniqueIdent INNER JOIN usr.ITSM_FormFullView AS itsmT ON itsmT.UniqueSourceIdent = itsmLinSbf.TargetUniqueIdent INNER JOIN usr.ITSMLinkType AS itsmLit ON itsmLit.Guid = itsmLinSbf.ITSMLinkTypeGuid AND itsmLit.LanguageID = @UserLanguageID WHERE itsmLinSbf.[State] != @DeletedState AND (itsmLinSbf.SourceUniqueIdent = CONCAT(@ID, '#', @ThisFormIdent) OR itsmLinSbf.TargetUniqueIdent = CONCAT(@ID, '#', @ThisFormIdent)) AND itsmLinSbf.FormIdent = @FormIdent

DECLARE @Group_ITSM VARCHAR(255) = usr.GetResourceText('Group_ITSM', @UserLanguageID);
SELECT itsmFfv.SourceID ,'ITSMRelease' AS FormIdent ,itsmFfv.ITSMKey ,itsmFfv.[Subject] ,fol.[Name] AS LastFolderTreeIdent FROM usr.ITSM_FormFullView AS itsmFfv INNER JOIN dbo.FolderTree AS fot ON fot.Ident = itsmFfv.LastFolderTreeIdent INNER JOIN dbo.Folder AS fol ON fol.ID = fot.FolderID WHERE itsmFfv.ParentTableID = @ID AND itsmFfv.SourceFormIdent = 'ITSMRelease' AND #PERMISSION[ITSMRelease(itsmFfv)]#

Section.HTMLTemplate:
[#BasicInformation_ITSM#]
[#ScheduledRelease_ITSM#]
[#ReleaseApproval_ITSM#]
[#ReleaseShutdown_ITSM#]
[#ReleaseDeployment_ITSM#]
[#ReleaseTesting_ITSM#]
[#RollbackInformation_ITSM#]
[#Communication_ITSM#]
[#ReporterInformation_ITSM#]
[#ReporterEmailDifferent_Information_ITSM#]
[#ReporterPhoneDifferent_Information_ITSM#]
[#ApproverSubForm_ITSM#]

VisibleCondition.SQL: SELECT IIF( EXISTS( SELECT NULL FROM dbo.History WHERE TableID = @ID AND FormIdent = @FormIdent AND HistoryTypeID = @HistoryTypeID AND State IN (30,40) ) ,1,0 )

Section.HTMLTemplate:
[#ITSMLinkSubForm_ITSM#]
[#ITSMStructure_ITSM#]
